title: Bushy Leaves Textures
description: Adds randomized bushy leaves textures to all trees and some other blocks
body:
# Bushy Leaves

This pack adds a subtle change to all leaf blocks:

- All the leaf blocks now come with a 66% chance to use a bushy block model. 33% of leaf blocks use the vanilla block model. 
- Mangrove Roots and Azalea plants are also affected.
- Moss an Pale Moss carpets have 66% chance to overlay the block underneath them.

Get a quick overview in this video from 5:30 to 6:43:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QVHNhv8FHGo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Have a look at the gallery for more images :)

### Credit
If you have any feedback, feel free to join my Discord and let me know.
Make sure to check out my other packs on my Modrinth profile as well :D
